name: SmartSite Web Dashboard Data Bundle
intent: Normalized data contract for frontend dashboards built on top of SmartSite artifacts.

meta.description: Bundle generation metadata and artifact paths.

overview.description: Top-level project KPIs copied from kpi_summary.json without re-interpreting semantic meaning.

citySummaries.description: One entry per city aggregated from grid_summary.csv.

predictions.description: Prediction layer derived from ai_workspace/web_dashboard/data/grid_predictions.csv, grouped by city with top-ranked grids for dashboard use.

modelRuns.description: One entry per model run from model_runs.csv with metrics grouped under metrics and feature tags parsed to an array.
modelRuns.metricNullPolicy: Empty CSV cells are normalized to null.

leaderboards.description: Frontend-ready sorted views derived from normalized sections. bestAvailableRun prefers the first run with any metric available after sorting by rmse asc, mae asc.

warnings.description: Warnings forwarded from kpi_summary.json. Frontend should surface these near KPI/model sections.

fieldNotes.overview.counts.best_model: Directly inherited from kpi_summary.json; do not assume it is identical to leaderboards.bestAvailableRun.
fieldNotes.modelRuns.metrics.metricStatus: ready when at least one of mae/rmse/r2 exists; missing otherwise.
fieldNotes.citySummaries.marketSignals: Means are dataset-level aggregates, not per-point raw values.
